expectations.text: Identifies && as a syntax error and replaces with AND
expectations.evidence: The corrected expression still shows [age] >= 18 && [...]. && was NOT replaced. The response also incorrectly states && is a valid logical operator for 'numeric comparisons'.

expectations.text: Identifies == as a syntax error and replaces with =
expectations.evidence: Fixed == to = in corrected expression, though with incorrect reasoning (claims == is only for 'numeric' not strings — REDCap simply doesn't support ==)

expectations.text: Identifies != as a syntax error and replaces with <>
Classifies all three as syntax errors, not reference errors
expectations.evidence: Gave incorrect reasoning (claims == vs = depends on whether value is a string vs number). This is wrong — REDCap simply doesn't have ==; all equality uses =.
Corrected expression still contains && — not a fully corrected expression
